instructions: Use this focused pack before opening the full 452-row source discovery template.
Confirm exact product/detail URLs on allowed official domains only.
Fill manual_confirmed_source_url and set manual_review_status only after product identity matches.
Run tools/import_confirmed_source_discovery_rows.py as a dry run before any write.

items.name_ja: ちいかわ ラバーストラップ (うさぎ)
items.search_query: ちいかわ ラバーストラップ (うさぎ) 엔스카이 official 公式 商品画像
manual_review_checklist: Open the search hint and keep evidence on www.enskyshop.com.
Confirm the page is an exact product/detail page, not a search result or category page.
Confirm product title, series, character/variant, category, and release context match this catalog row.
Only then fill manual_confirmed_source_url; attach image_url only if the product image is verified from the accepted source.
items.acceptance_rule: product title, product image, and character/variant must match the catalog row
